p.strong: Linearization points (LP) define the canonical sequence of operations.

ol.li: Structural Integrity: Nodes linked in order. CAS(tail->next) only succeeds if tail->next == NULL.
Linearization: Hardware-level CAS ensures a total order of successful updates.
Visibility: If LP₁ completes before LP₂ starts, LP₁ must precede LP₂ in the total order.
Chain Order: dequeue() must follow the head->next pointers, ensuring oldest node is removed.

p.code: LP₁ (enq A) < LP₂ (enq B) < LP₃ (enq C)

div.p: Since queue is a Linked Chain: deq() follows nodes A → B → C

p.code: LP₄ (deq A) < LP₅ (deq B) < LP₆ (deq C)

div.p: Result: FIFO sequence is strictly preserved.
